name: Long Context with clear_tool_uses (Sonnet 4.6, Wave 2)
description: Request near the 200K context boundary to trigger context_management.edits with clear_tool_uses_20250919. Prompt is supplied at runtime via --prompt-file (generated by scripts/verification/generate-long-context-prompt.ts). The prompt field here is a placeholder only.
expectedBehavior: body.context_management.edits[] contains {type: 'clear_tool_uses_20250919'} when context exceeds CC's internal threshold. context-management-2025-06-27 beta is present. Response may include a context_management summary block.
